chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-195 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 594/25 2.For orders on CMA 595/25 3.For hearing of main case 28-07-2025 Mr. Ashique Hussain Chhalgri, Advocate for the petitioner. **** 1. Urgency is granted. 2&3. At the very outset, counsel for petitioner submits that petitioner has filed Family Suit against her husband Noor Din (respondent No.5) for dissolution of marriage by way of Khulla and such suit is pending adjudication before the Judge, Family Court at Khairpur; however, respondent No.5 and other private respondents are causing hurdles and causing harassment to the petitioner in order to develop pressure upon her to withdraw the family suit; therefore, she seeks protection of law. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant A.G present in Court in other matters while waiving notice submits that official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and legal protection will be provided to the petitioner, as and when required. After such statement, learned counsel for petitioner being satisfied seeks disposal of instant petition. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of along with listed applications with directions to provide protection to the petitioner, as and when she needed. Let copy of this order be communicated to SSP, Khairpur for information and compliance. JUDGE Ahmad
